# CANDIDATE: V14E_BEAR_VIX_QUALITY_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** quality_gate (filter improvement)
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-STAGE-1-BACKTEST)

## Hypothesis

V14E bear entries in high-VIX regimes (VIX≥25) and medium-confidence signals are false triggers that consume edge without contributing to J-anchor captures. Suppressing them preserves J-anchor coverage while improving aggregate WR.

## Mechanism

Gym validator rule in `lib/gym/validators/v14e_bear_quality.py`:
- Block V14E bear entries when `vix >= 25.0`
- Block V14E bear entries when `confidence != "high"`

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | v14e bear fires 12:10 (VIX~17, high) | UNCHANGED | $0 |
| 5/01 winner | v14e bear fires 13:35 (VIX~18, high) | UNCHANGED | $0 |
| 5/04 winner | v14e bear fires 10:05+11:15 (VIX~16, high) | UNCHANGED | $0 |
| 5/05 loser | No v14e bear signal | UNCHANGED | $0 |
| 5/06 loser | No v14e bear signal | UNCHANGED | $0 |
| 5/07 loser | No v14e bear signal | UNCHANGED | $0 |

**OP-16 verdict:** NO IMPACT — all J anchor days pass both gates.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A (watcher filter, no trade impact)
2. **Sample bias:** N=241 bear obs from V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher; VIX≥25 subset N=13 (5.4%); high-conf subset N=33 (13.7%). Small-N for VIX gate but directionally clear.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (Stage-1 backtest pending)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (post-gate validation)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - VIX≥25 gate: may miss rare high-vol bear moves (5% of signals)
   - High-conf gate: aggressive, blocks 86% of signals — consider medium threshold
   - Worst-case: gate blocks all V14E bear signals → engine relies on other setups
6. **Concentration:** VIX≥25 is regime-specific (~5% of obs), not concentration risk

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Stage-1 backtest: apply gates to watcher data, measure P&L delta
- [ ] Gym validator: 65/65 PASS (v40 baseline)
- [ ] Walk-forward: gated vs ungated OOS comparison
- [ ] Real-fills: validate on top-3 J days

## Confidence

5/10 — Data direction supports gates, but:
- VIX≥25 N=13 is thin
- High-conf gate blocks 86% — too aggressive without Stage-1 validation
- Need backtest before ratification

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements rank 3 (V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE) — this is a refinement of that watcher quality gate. Does not conflict with any other candidate.
